message:
feat(runtime): batch/sequence quit handling, subscription improvements

Program (program.rs):
- Batch and Sequence commands now properly stop after quit signal
- Improved command execution flow for cleaner shutdown sequences

Subscription (subscription.rs):
- Major refactoring for clearer state management
- Better lifecycle handling for subscription-based event sources
- Improved cancellation propagation

Render Thread (render_thread.rs):
- Minor adjustments for subscription changes compatibility

Resize Coalescer (resize_coalescer.rs):
- Timing adjustments for better resize event batching

Simulator (simulator.rs):
- Added forced_size support for deterministic testing

Tests (resize_migration_compat.rs):
- Updated for new runtime behavior

These changes improve the reliability of multi-command sequences and
ensure proper cleanup when applications request termination.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
